title: PlastChemTox evidence map - literature screening protocol
author: Martin Wagner
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: As part of the PlastChem project, we will perform a semi-systematic search of the scientific literature to identify peer-reviewed publications that have analyzed the toxicity caused by the mixture of chemicals migrating from plastic materials and products. As part of this work, we set up this protocol to screen the corpus resulting from this literature search for eligible publication. Accordingly, the protocol defines inclusion and exclusion criteria in line with the PI/EO framework.
steps_raw: As part of the PlastChem project, we will perform a semi-systematic search of the scientific literature to identify peer-reviewed publications that have analyzed the toxicity caused by the mixture of chemicals migrating from plastic materials and products. As part of this work, we set up this protocol to screen the corpus resulting from this literature search for eligible publication. Accordingly, the protocol defines inclusion and exclusion criteria in line with the PI/EO framework.
